Journal.title: Journal
Journal.description: A scholarly journal hosted on the platform.

university.description: The name of the university or institution owning the journal.

description.description: A brief overview or description of the journal's scope.

issn.description: The ISSN (International Standard Serial Number) of the journal.

domain.description: The academic field or domain (e.g., Engineering, Law).

country.description: The country of origin for the journal.

indexing.description: List of indexing services (e.g., Scopus, UGC CARE).

link.description: The external URL for the journal.

imageUrl.description: The data URI or URL of the journal cover image.

isFeatured.description: Whether the journal is featured on the home page.

PricingPlan.title: Pricing Plan
PricingPlan.description: A dynamic pricing plan for journal hosting.

name.description: The name of the pricing plan.

description.description: A brief summary of the plan's purpose.

features.description: List of features included in the plan.

cta.description: The text for the call-to-action button.

highlight.description: Whether this plan should be visually highlighted as recommended.

tag.description: An optional badge text (e.g. Recommended, Popular).
